description: Triage-recovery agent step schemas. Per-issue closure step: handles ONE OPEN GitHub Issue per invocation. The agent verifies the issue is orphaned (carries ≥1 workflow label, none actionable), computes the orphan label set, and emits issue.labels.remove. The poll:state boundary hook applies the removal via gh issue edit --remove-label. WORKFLOW_LABELS and ACTIONABLE_LABELS are derived dynamically from the workflow JSON (no hardcoded label names).

recover.description: Recover closure step response for a single issue. Boundary hook reads issue.labels.remove and runs gh issue edit --remove-label.

status.description: completed = orphan labels identified and emitted for removal; skipped = issue is not recovery-eligible (no orphan labels, or carries actionable label); failed = could not assess (e.g. issue fetch error).

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary (e.g., 'stripped 1 orphan label from #488', 'skipped #501: already actionable (kind:impl)').

action.description: 'closing' terminates the recovery for this issue (the boundary hook then strips labels). 'repeat' re-runs the step on transient failure (gh fetch error).

issue.description: Per-issue payload consumed by the poll:state boundary hook. The hook merges agent.json github.labels.completion with this object's labels.{add,remove} and runs gh issue edit accordingly.

number.description: GitHub issue number this invocation targets (must equal --issue).

labels.description: Label mutations for the boundary hook. For recovery, populate labels.remove with the orphan workflow labels. labels.add MUST be empty — triager owns kind:* / order:N assignment on the next run.

add.description: Always empty. Recovery never adds labels.

remove.description: Orphan workflow labels to strip. Empty when issue is not recovery-eligible (boundary hook will be a no-op).

items.description: Label name. Must be in WORKFLOW_LABELS (labelMapping keys ∪ prioritizer.labels) AND not in ACTIONABLE_LABELS.

closure_action.description: Recovery never closes issues. Set to 'label-only' to override the default closure_action. The boundary hook honours this and only mutates labels.

verdict.description: Optional free-form verdict string surfaced by the boundary hook (e.g., 'orphan-stripped', 'not-eligible').
